title: Spicy Padron Pepper Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic curry made with sweet Padron peppers, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of Southern spices and Thai curry paste gives this dish a unique twist.

ingredients.name: Padron peppers
ingredients.notes: Choose sweet peppers for this recipe

instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the Padron peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the Southern-style curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the curry and water, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the peppers are tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the curry over rice, garnished with chopped peanuts or scallions if desired.
